title: Rocky Mountain Trail Coloring Page

funFacts: Mountain ranges are formed when tectonic plates collide, pushing the Earth's crust upwards over millions of years.

Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about prehistoric animal anatomy while developing fine motor coordination.
